description: Lead engineering teams at Radar, a location data platform built on TypeScript and Rust. Requires deep understanding of the Rust/TS backend stack alongside people management.

description: Polars is a blazing-fast dataframe library written in Rust. The Performance Engineer role focuses on query engine optimization, SIMD vectorization, and memory layout improvements.
note: Polars is hiring a performance-focused Rust engineer. Requirements include experience with a low-level language (preferably Rust), systems programming fundamentals, and profiling tools like samply.

description: Lead engineering at Qdrant, a Rust-only vector similarity search engine used for AI/ML workloads. Rust mentioned in role requirements.
note: Qdrant is a Rust-native vector database. VP of Engineering role leads the engineering org with Rust mentioned in requirements.

description: Tracel AI builds Burn (Rust-native deep learning framework, 15k+ stars) and cubecl (unified GPU compute in Rust). Multiple Rust roles: ML Scientist, HPC Developer, Compiler Developer, Web Developer.

First engineering hire owning embedded no_std Rust firmware for a software-defined BMS platform. Rust is the primary language for the embedded firmware, with responsibilities from implementation through certification.

Mainmatter, the company behind EuroRust, is hiring a Rust engineering consultant to support clients like Google, BMW, and Redis in adopting Rust. The role involves reviewing codebases, recommending improvements, and training teams on advanced Rust concepts.
